arts.ttl: “Good step” | West Ham starlet speaks on his man of the match performance
arts.sum: West Ham starlet Oliver Scarles says he is “grateful” for the faith Graham Potter has shown. Despite him speaking a lot about youth when he was first appointed, the lack of integration of West Ham’s brilliant set of youngsters is one of the reasons Julen Lopetegui was so disliked.
